hook: Your competitor just cut their operational costs by 40 percent using AI. You're still thinking about it.
body_script: Here's what I see every week: business owners know AI matters. They read the articles. They attend the webinars. But they don't act. And while they wait, their competitors are deploying custom AI that handles customer service, automates operations, and scales revenue without adding headcount. The cost of waiting isn't zero. It's compounding daily. Every month you delay is another month of manual processes, missed opportunities, and competitors pulling ahead.
cta: Stop researching. Start implementing. Book a free AI audit at azen.io. We'll show you exactly where you're losing ground.
recording_notes: Direct to camera. Serious but not aggressive tone. Use hand gestures to emphasize 'waiting' vs 'acting.' Pause after hook for impact. Speed up slightly during body to create urgency. Slow down and look directly at camera for CTA.

hook: Your business doesn't need AI. It needs better systems. AI just makes good systems work faster.
body_script: Before you implement any AI tool, answer three questions. One: What takes your team the most time that doesn't require human judgment? That's where AI starts. Two: Where do you already have documented processes? AI can't fix chaos — it scales what already works. Three: What would free up ten hours a week for your best people? That's your ROI target. Most owners skip straight to tools. Smart ones build systems first, then automate them.
cta: Follow for frameworks that actually help you ship. Not just hype.
recording_notes: Direct to camera, casual setting. Speak conversationally like you're explaining this to a founder over coffee. Pause briefly after each question to let it land. No need to be polished — authentic delivery matters more than production quality here.
